markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review two initial brand concepts for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Concept 1 (Contrast) is the clear favorite for its quality, but its bold style may be too "audio media" for an engineering framework.** Renato will test this with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**Concept 2 (Wormhole) is less fresh and feels like a safer, more traditional tech approach.**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [**The core "input-output" metaphor must be conveyed through animation or form, not a literal symbol.**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**Next step:** Renato will share the Figma file with the team to gather feedback and provide a consolidated, directional response.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

## Topics

### Concept 1: Contrast

  - [**Core Idea:** Visualize the "input → output" process using visual contrast (texture, color, typography).](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Web Application:**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Header:** Bold, using a clipped image/video within the logo's last three letters.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**Body:** Shifts to a calmer, minimalist layout (e.g., split-screen) for content.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [**Footer:** Returns to the bold, full-width image/video.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Renato's Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [**Quality:** "Super strong" and a personal favorite.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Concern:** The style feels more like "audio media" than an "engineering framework," which may trigger internal pushback.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Logo:** In the second website concept, the logo felt too hard against the monotype font.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Concept 2: Wormhole / Funnel

  - [**Core Idea:** A "wormhole" or "funnel" shape represents the transformation process.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Web Application:**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Style:** A "safer," more traditional tech aesthetic (light mode).](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [**Layout:** The funnel shape is integrated throughout, with lines guiding the user down the page.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Animation:** Potential for glowing lines that animate on scroll.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [**Renato's Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [The website concept feels less fresh and has been seen before.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Giel:** Prepare the Figma file and share it with Renato.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [**Renato:**](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [Review the Figma file.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Share with the team to gather feedback on both concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [Provide consolidated, directional feedback to the design team.](https://fathom.video/share/HXas5zen4iszTzijNJig5-6vm7KhpnqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
